title: Review Exit Confirmation Dialog UX
description: Session 6 added confirmation dialogs to File>Exit and Tray>Exit. User must confirm EXIT vs MINIMIZE choice. Review: Are dialog messages clear? Does No=Minimize feel natural? Should there be a 'Don't ask again' checkbox?
notes: Contemplation: Balance between user safety (no accidental close) and UX friction. Consider adding config toggle for confirmation dialogs.
